text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

This is not a bug but a question (at least not something that should be 
in the gnats database). PLease ask your question on the Questions 
mailinglist 
(http://lists.freebsd.org/mailman/listinfo/freebsd-questions/) and 
checkout the web http://www.freebsd.org/where.html which provides 
information on how to get the proper cd's etc.
